title: Differential Equations (2DE)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent; MAM2010F and MAM2011F.

outline: Students study the fundamentals of differential equations, including: first and second-order difference equations; linear differential equations with constant coefficients; Laplace transforms; nonlinear equations and phase plane analysis; parabolic partial differential equations, separation of variables and boundary value problems; Black-Scholes equation; stochastic differential equations.
lecture_times: Tuesdays, Fridays and some Wednesdays in 4th period. Note: Lectures alternate during the week so students can take MAM2012S, MAM2013S and MAM2014S concurrently.
